states.name: Dairyu
states.title: Green Dragon
states.description: Sometimes in Erden, great people reincarnate into wondrous beasts. The truly generous can sometimes resurrect as Dairyu, great green dragons. They're blessed with a unique ability to grant wishes. This makes finding them hugely desirable. However, most have expended their one wish and cannot grant another.

states.name: Dairyu
states.title: Green Dragon
states.description: It's said that there are magical gemstones that, when found, can restore a green dragon's wish-granting ability. The dragons vigorously deny this. Not necessarily because they don't think they exist, but because searching for a series of tiny gems all over Erden would be a fruitless exercise for even the greatest adventurers.
